title: Audit Log for Data Mutations
instruction: Plan the implementation of an audit log system that records all create, update, and delete operations on User and Order entities. Each log entry must capture: who performed the action, what changed (before/after diff), when, and from which IP. Logs must be queryable by entity type, entity ID, and actor. The system uses SQLAlchemy with a PostgreSQL backend.
codebase_context:
```
# Existing stack: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.x + PostgreSQL
# Current models use SQLAlchemy ORM with event listeners already set up for soft deletes.
app/
  models/
    base.py        # DeclarativeBase, SoftDeleteMixin
    user.py        # User(SoftDeleteMixin)
    order.py       # Order(SoftDeleteMixin)
  services/
    user_service.py
    order_service.py
  db.py            # async session factory
```
